steps.title: Set up similar triangles
steps.content:
At the same time of day, the trees and shadows form similar right triangles. So the height-to-shadow ratios are equal.
$$\frac{10}{5}=\frac{x}{2}$$

steps.title: Find the other height
steps.content: Simplify and solve. $$2=\frac{x}{2}$$ $$x=4$$ The answer is B.
